channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump keeps military option against Iran open while pursuing diplomacy
item.description: President Trump says he called off a planned attack on Iran at the request of Gulf allies, as serious peace negotiations continue.

item.title: In a first, Secretary Hegseth campaigns during Iran conflict
item.description: The Pentagon stated that no taxpayer funds were used for the trip.

item.title: Three killed in shooting at Islamic Center of San Diego; two suspects dead
item.description: Three people died in a shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, and two suspected shooters were found dead in a nearby vehicle, police report.

item.title: Pennsylvania primaries to shape key House races and midterm elections
item.description: Democrats aim to flip four GOP-held House seats in Pennsylvania.
